query: SELECT cs.id, cs.name, cs.ocppIdentity, e.id as evse_id, e.evseIdLocal, e.connectorId FROM charging_stations cs LEFT JOIN evses e ON e.stationId = cs.id ORDER BY cs.id, e.evseIdLocal;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kTaiYRMPpnS3sR.17f9e41a6e58 --database UcUrociZeo4QVAHHN9vAuZ --execute SELECT cs.id, cs.name, cs.ocppIdentity, e.id as evse_id, e.evseIdLocal, e.connectorId FROM charging_stations cs LEFT JOIN evses e ON e.stationId = cs.id ORDER BY cs.id, e.evseIdLocal;
